title: peplidium maritimum
intro: Peplidium maritimum, also known as sea asphodel, is a flowering plant species found in coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Peplidium maritimum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Peplidium maritimum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat colds, sore throats, and skin irritations.
